evals.prompt: Prep for the Tokyo trip — three weeks out.
evals.expected_output: Per-traveler packing list (reading family-member docs for sizes / meds / allergies) + pre-trip task list (passports, holds, pet care, etc.); appended to the trip page.

evals.prompt: What should we pack for the ski trip?
evals.expected_output: Cold-weather packing list per traveler, plus pre-trip tasks specific to ski travel (rentals, lift tickets, etc.).

evals.prompt: Run trip prep for the Yellowstone trip in two weeks.
evals.expected_output: Default trip-prep output for the named trip: per-person packing list + pre-trip task list.
